allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Resolve-DnsName api.themoviedb.org -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize; Resolve-DnsName api.tmdb.org -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize; Resolve-DnsName images.weserv.nl -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-DnsClientServerAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host '---'; Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object Status -eq 'Up' | Format-Table Name,InterfaceDescription -AutoSize")

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'adguard|pihole|nextdns|kaspersky|norton|mcafee|eset|bitdefender|family|netlimiter|proxifier|fortiguard|opendns|cleanbrowsing|comodo|qustodio|circle|netnanny|cloudflare|warp' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(git commit -m 'Refactor: split movie_detail_screen, fix regressions, remove mock search fallback *)
